raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winnam buhs fazziht:
es ne efinu Braweets / es efinu
weens Wihrs / kas to Semmi
apkoipvj / jo weens Zilweks irr
manni faderrejs no mannas
Jaunibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja kas uhs winnu faz-
zihg: Kas tahs tahdas Wahtis
tawas Rohkas? Tad buhs win-
nam fazziht: Ta efinu es fakults
manno Mihkotajn Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sohbins/uhsmostees prett
mannu Gannu/ un prett to
Wihtu/kas mans Beedris irr/
fakka tas KUNGS Zebaot:
Sitt to Gannu/ tad isknifsees
tas gannams Pulks/ bet es gree-
fischu tawu Rohku pee teem
Sihkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas notiks wiffa tai
Semmê/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Diwi Dalkas taps eeksch tahs
isdeldetas/un islaidibs to Garru/
un ta trescha Dalka taps eeksch
tahs atlizzinata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es weddischu to treschu
Dalku Ugguni/ un fchkikstischu
tohs ka Sudrabs tohp jckik-
stihts/ un pahrbaudischu tohs/
ta Selts tohp pahrbaudihts.
Tas peefanks mannu Wahrdu/
un es paklausischu to/ un fazzi-
fcnu: Tee irr manni Landis/un
fas fazzihs: Tas KUNGS irr
mans Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Edsi/ ta Deena
no ta KUNGA/
Etaws Laupijums
isdallihts tawa Widdin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es sapulzinachu
Jerusalemi wissadus Pag-
Karrá/ un tas Pilstahts
uhskemts/ un tee Nammi
stiti/ un tahs Geewas apfi-
tas. Un weena Puffe ta-
tahta igees Zeetumiá/ bet tee
likkuschi Laudis ne taps no p-
fahta tsdelleti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS ise
un karrohs prett teim Pa-
neem / itt ka tai Deena/
winscb irr karrojs Rauscha
Deena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Rabjas stahw
cai Deena us ta Etjes-Ral-
kas preekfch Jerusalemes
prett Rihta Puffi/ un tas Et-
Rains saplihsibs diwejos G-
balds/ prett Rihta Puffi
prett Wakkara Puffi/ ta ta
weena tohti leela Geletja bu-
un weena Puffe ta Kalna lo-
fees prett Seemeta Puffi/ ni-
ohtra prett Deenas-Wid-
Puffi.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
